notes: Lab-measured drop 9.6mm vs brand-claimed 5mm. Energy return 65.4%, midsole softness 39.5 AC. Neutral daily trainer with above-average stability (torsional rigidity 4/5, heel counter 4/5). Narrow tapered toebox. Knit upper with perfect 5/5 breathability. Brand weight 235g, lab 232g.

Lab-measured values used (heel 40.9mm, forefoot 33.5mm, drop 7.4mm, weight 254g). ASICS claims 41.5mm stack and 8mm drop. Softest Novablast yet (30.3 AC). AHAR LO outsole, jacquard mesh upper, late mild forefoot rocker. Despite stack >=40mm it's lightweight, classified as daily_trainer not max_cushion.

Lab-measured drop 11.4mm vs Nike claimed 10mm; lab heel 33.6mm/forefoot 22.2mm vs brand 37/27mm. Features dual Air Zoom units (heel and forefoot), rockered sole. Low traction (0.25). True to size. $10 price increase from v40.

Nylon winged plate. Pebax-based PWRRUN PB foam, firmer than v3 (38.9 AC). Energy return 72.0% heel / 73.4% forefoot. Tempo super-trainer, neutral. Slightly small fit, narrow tapered toebox. Wet traction 0.50. Brand weight/drop differ: 235g, 8.0mm drop.

Neutral daily trainer with mild stability features (reinforced sidewalls, stiff 5/5 heel counter). Lab-measured values used (drop 12.4mm lab vs 12.0mm brand; heel 35.1mm, forefoot 22.7mm). Midsole firmness 41.5 AC (firmer than average). Breathability 4/5. Segmented Crash Pad outsole. Forefoot stack also cited as 22.8mm in text.
